trueuuid.chat.online_mode: [TrueUUID] Premium account verified by the server's online mode.
trueuuid.chat.offline_fallback: [TrueUUID] Offline fallback accepted. This account was not premium-verified.
trueuuid.subtitle.offline: Using the server's configured offline fallback
trueuuid.disconnect.timeout: Login timed out before account verification completed.
trueuuid.disconnect.auth_denied: Premium account verification failed. Please check your connection and try again.
trueuuid.disconnect.bound_premium: This name is already bound to a verified premium account. Offline fallback is not allowed.
trueuuid.disconnect.custom_endpoint_unsu: This server does not support custom Yggdrasil endpoints. Log in with a Mojang account.
trueuuid.confirm.offline_player.title: Confirm Offline Data Migration
trueuuid.confirm.offline_player.message:
Same-name offline player data was detected.

Current login method: %1$s
Offline UUID: %2$s
Data to migrate: %3$s

The offline player data will be backed up first, then migrated to the current account.
After migration, this name will be bound to the current account and offline login will no longer be allowed.
trueuuid.disconnect.migration_pending: Offline player data migration is still finishing. Please rejoin shortly.
trueuuid.disconnect.migration_confirm_ti: Offline player data migration confirmation timed out. No player data was changed. Please rejoin and confirm.
trueuuid.disconnect.duplicate_uuid:
Duplicate UUID player data was detected.

Current login method: %1$s
Offline UUID: %2$s
Current UUID: %3$s

This means the same name has both premium/skin-site UUID data and offline UUID data.
To inherit the offline data, contact an administrator and ask them to run /trueuuid migrateuuid %4$s.
If the offline data is only old duplicate data, use /trueuuid cleanupuuid %4$s to clean it.
trueuuid.disconnect.migration_failed:
Offline player data migration failed. Joining was cancelled to avoid data corruption.

Player: %1$s
Offline UUID: %2$s
Current UUID: %3$s

Reason: %4$s
trueuuid.command.mojang.reachable: [TrueUUID] Mojang Session Server is reachable, response code: %s
trueuuid.command.mojang.unexpected: [TrueUUID] Mojang Session Server returned an unexpected response code: %s
trueuuid.command.mojang.connect_failed: [TrueUUID] Unable to connect to Mojang Session Server: %s
trueuuid.command.cleanup.not_found: [TrueUUID] No duplicate offline UUID data found for %s.
trueuuid.command.cleanup.success:
[TrueUUID] Cleaned duplicate offline UUID data for %1$s.
Offline UUID: %2$s
Found data: %3$s
Moved files: %4$s
Backup directory: %5$s
trueuuid.command.cleanup.failure: [TrueUUID] Failed to clean duplicate UUID data: %s
trueuuid.command.migrate.no_verified: [TrueUUID] No premium/skin-site UUID binding found for %s. Ask the player to complete one verified login first.
trueuuid.command.migrate.no_offline: [TrueUUID] No same-name offline UUID data found for %s.
trueuuid.command.migrate.success:
[TrueUUID] Migrated %1$s's offline UUID data to the premium/skin-site UUID.
Offline UUID: %2$s
Target UUID: %3$s
Migrated data: %4$s
A backup was created automatically under the world's trueuuid-backups/offline-upgrades directory.
trueuuid.command.migrate.failure: [TrueUUID] Failed to migrate offline UUID data: %s
trueuuid.error.internal: Internal server error; check the server log
